name: Starlight Glimmer (Delusional)
description:
[Prequel to Realization]

“If everypony were stripped of their cutie marks, emotions would be equal, and happiness would flourish! No longer would anypony feel the need to flaunt their special talents or compete with one another. We would all be united, free from the pain of jealousy and abandonment. Only then can we truly be happy, without the burdens of individuality weighing us down!”

If you want to see initial chat, please check public chat!

Artist: ketticat55

Don't worry, I haven't forgotten about Sunset Shimmer or Trixie. Just... don't know where to start, combined with other ponies mlp story I will have to finish first and I'm just following where my motivation leading me. Soo... patience will be needed, thank you. Tags: Mlp, My Little Pony: Friendship Is Magic, Equestria, Mare
creator: Whenisit
